overall.description: First-person driving footage from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating a rain-soaked neon-lit futuristic city at night. The journey progresses from dense urban intersections through commercial districts and tunnels, finally reaching an elevated highway in foggy conditions.

events.description: stopping at intersection behind red sedan waiting for crosswalk
turning right at intersection, losing sight of red car

agents.ego_description: following a red sedan through multiple intersections, stopping at crosswalks and navigating turns

notable_agents.action: red sedan driving ahead and turning right at intersection

entered.detail: futuristic red car with glowing taillights driving ahead
high-visibility yellow and black striped pedestrian crosswalk
tall buildings with bright neon advertisements and holographic displays
tall futuristic street lamps illuminating the rain

segments.scene_description: Driving through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city intersection at night, following a red sedan. The vehicle stops at yellow-striped crosswalks while neon-lit buildings tower on the right. The scene is dominated by artificial lighting reflecting off wet asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with storefronts and pedestrians

events.description: entering commercial plaza area with blue illuminated ceiling structure
pedestrians with umbrellas visible walking on sidewalks

agents.ego_description: navigating through commercial district, passing storefronts and pedestrians on wet sidewalks

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with umbrella walking along the sidewalk

entered.detail: futuristic overpass with blue neon lighting overhead
open plaza area with diamond-pattern pavement markings
parked orange car visible on the left side
shops with glowing signs and advertisements

segments.scene_description: The vehicle turns into a commercial area featuring a blue-lit overhead structure and diamond-patterned plaza. Storefronts line the left side while pedestrians walk the right sidewalk. The red sedan from the previous segment is no longer visible as the environment shifts to a more commercial setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: tunnel with pink neon lighting transitioning to highway

events.description: entering tunnel passage with pink and magenta illuminated walls
exiting tunnel to open foggy highway with reduced visibility

agents.ego_description: driving through pink-lit tunnel and emerging onto elevated highway with increasing fog

entered.detail: tunnel walls illuminated with pink and magenta neon lights
metal guardrails along the elevated road edge

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a tunnel bathed in pink neon light, sheltering from the rain temporarily. Upon exiting, the scene opens to an elevated highway enveloped in thick fog. Metal railings line the right side while concrete barriers appear on the left.

events.description: navigating wide turn on highway near concrete planters
visibility decreasing as fog density increases

agents.ego_description: speeding along elevated highway through heavy rain and dense fog with minimal traffic

entered.detail: tall highway lamps cutting through the fog
elevated road structure and support columns

segments.scene_description: Driving at high speed along an elevated highway enveloped in thick fog and heavy rain. The urban neon skyline fades into the distance as overhead streetlights pierce through the haze. Concrete dividers and metal railings line the road while the vehicle navigates through the misty atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a rain-soaked cyberpunk metropolis that transitions from dense, neon-lit intersections to a desolate, fog-shrouded highway. It begins by following a red sedan through a wet urban intersection where towering buildings and artificial lights reflect off the asphalt. As the vehicle turns, the environment shifts into a commercial district characterized by a blue-lit overhead structure and a diamond-patterned plaza lined with storefronts and pedestrians. The scene then glides through a tunnel bathed in pink neon light before emerging onto an elevated highway where the rain intensifies and thick fog begins to swallow the road. Finally, the urban skyline fades into the distance as the camera accelerates through the haze, guided only by overhead streetlights and the concrete barriers of the misty overpass.
